patterns: Full-screen Mapbox GL canvas underneath all UI elements
Floating search pill at the top of the viewport (top-12 inset-x-4 absolute, z-50)
Bottom sheets for place details, routing, and map style switcher (fixed bottom-0 inset-x-0 rounded-t-3xl z-50)
Floating Action Buttons (FABs) stacked vertically on the bottom right for Location and Map Styles

buttons.primary: bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-400 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/25 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.fab: h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.search: w-full bg-zinc-900/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-4 text-white placeholder-zinc-400 shadow-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 transition-all
inputs.standard: w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-zinc-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500

surfaces.bottomSheet: bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 rounded-t-3xl shadow-[0_-8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] p-6

markers.custom: h-8 w-8 rounded-full bg-blue-500 border-2 border-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center text-white

accessibility.contrast: Text meets APCA/WCAG AA against dark backgrounds. Primary buttons use white text on blue.
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='location-fab', data-testid='style-switcher-button', data-testid='google-signin-btn')

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 2, rounded edges. Size 24px for standard UI, 20px for inline.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue topographic map with glowing lines
image_urls.instructions: Use this as a full-cover background image on the Google Sign-in screen. Apply a black overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure the sign-in button and logo are highly visible.
Use this as the default user profile avatar when the user signs in.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK NOTE: Build this as a Mobile-First App (PWA) using React.js and Tailwind CSS since the default stack is React JS.
MAPBOX IMPLEMENTATION: Use 'react-map-gl' or Mapbox GL JS directly. The map MUST be absolute, taking up 100vh and 100vw.
UI LAYERS: The UI must float over the map using absolute positioning and high z-indexes (z-50). Do not place the map inside a flex row/col that crushes it.

MAP STYLES: Implement a state to toggle between the 4 Mapbox styles: 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/streets-v12', 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/satellite-v9', 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/dark-v11', 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/outdoors-v12'.
BOTTOM SHEETS: Build bottom sheets using fixed positioning at the bottom of the screen. Use Framer Motion for slide-up animations if available, or Tailwind translate utility classes.
TESTING: Every button, input, map marker, and map style toggle MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="search-bar"').
ROUTING: Build a mock routing interface if Mapbox Directions API key is missing. The UI should show origin, destination, and distance/time.
CUSTOM MARKERS: Allow users to tap on the map to add a custom marker. Show a bottom sheet to enter 'Title' and 'Notes' for the saved location.
